description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted human figure, with elongated limbs and body parts stretched in unnatural directions. The head and face are somewhat recognizable, but the torso, arms, and legs are warped and twisted, creating an abstract and surreal appearance. The figure appears to be wearing a form-fitting outfit, but the details are obscured by the extreme stretching and blending of textures. The hands and feet are barely distinguishable, merging into the elongated forms that extend outward. The overall shape is irregular, with sharp angles and curves that do not correspond to typical human anatomy. The asset gives the impression of a pedestrian adult, but the severe deformation makes it appear more like a digital glitch or corrupted model.
description: A severely distorted and elongated human figure with stretched limbs and warped body parts, resembling a glitched pedestrian adult.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face and upper torso most clearly, with arms and legs stretched diagonally away from the body.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the extreme elongation of the limbs and the head protruding horizontally, with the body twisted and flattened.
description_view_2: From the back, the figure's torso and head are visible, with limbs curving outward in unnatural arcs.
description_view_3: Another side view, highlighting the warped lower body and the head extending horizontally, with limbs forming sharp, irregular angles.
attribute_posture: contorted and elongated, with limbs stretched in unnatural directions
